tool_args.code:
#!/bin/bash
# Today is Thursday (2026-04-02) -> Tuesday-Saturday range -> DAYS=2
echo "Running Gmail sync for DAYS=2 (Thursday: Tue-Sat rule)"
python /a0/usr/skills/gmail/scripts/gmail_reader.py --days 2 &
echo $! > /tmp/gmail_sync.pid
sleep 5
